question: Stephen Curry left- vs right-corner 3-point shooting in the 2016-17 regular season
notes: PLAN §12 row 9. fact_shot.shot_zone_basic only carries 'Above the Break 3', 'Restricted Area', 'Mid-Range', 'In The Paint (Non-RA)', 'Backcourt' — corner-3 labels are absent. The template reconstructs corner-3 classification via shot_zone_basic = 'Above the Break 3' AND |loc_x| >= 220 (NBA Stats API convention). 84 left corner + 58 right corner = 142 corner-3 attempts in Curry's unanimous-MVP season.
